title: GUOFUHEE Invests in Line Hydrogen and Secures Core Orders for Australian Projects
content: As a dedicated player in the hydrogen energy sector, GUOFUHEE has laid a solid foundation in Oceania. Its partner, Line Hydrogen, is a high-growth pre-IPO enterprise specializing in green hydrogen, with deep involvement in Australiaâ€™s national-level hydrogen energy demonstration projects. The companyâ€™s business scope covers hydrogen production, hydrogen refueling, and hydrogen-powered heavy-duty trucks, boasting profound technical expertise in industrial green power solutions. In accordance with the cooperation plan, the two parties will take the lead in jointly advancing the Tasmanian hydrogen energy project in Australia. On the practical cooperation front, GUOFUHEE has successfully locked in a long-term partnership to supply Line Hydrogen with a full set of core equipment, including water electrolysis hydrogen production systems, hydrogen refueling stations, and Multi-Element Gas Containers (MEGC).
author: Analysts Account
